rationale: Section 11.161 governs the implements of husbandry exemption, which is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Machinery and equipment items that are used in the production of farm or ranch products or of timber, regardless of their primary design, are considered to be implements of husbandry and are exempt from ad valorem taxation.
_note: Rule text concerns a separate exemption category (implements of husbandry) with no bearing on the proposed homestead exemption increase.
